title: print formatting of hex numbers, width does not match other simulators

features.name: hex format with width specifier in display
features.description: Code should include a $display or $write call with hex format specifier and explicit width (e.g., %8h) on a logic vector

features.name: 24-bit vector hex display width mismatch
features.description: Code should include a 24-bit logic vector displayed with %8h format specifier where the format width differs from the vector width
